verdict: FOREO Luna 2 is the proven predecessor technology offering the same T-Sonic oscillation benefits as Luna 3 with slightly fewer features, reflected in its massive review count (6,789). Excellent value proposition within FOREO's ecosystem.

_research.name: FOREO Luna 2 Facial Cleansing Brush
_research.con: Older technology model with fewer smart features compared to newer Luna 3 iteration.
